requirement_topic.en: PSE / DENAN Safety Certification — Scope Uncertainty for Stationary BESS [UNCERTAIN]
requirement_topic.zh: PSE / DENAN 安全认证 — 固定式储能系统适用范围不明确【存疑】
requirement_topic.zht: PSE / DENAN 安全認證 — 固定式儲能系統適用範圍不明確【存疑】

summary.en: [UNCERTAIN — verify with METI before relying on this row] Japan's Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act (電気用品安全法, DENAN), administered by METI, requires a PSE mark for 'designated electrical appliances and materials' listed in the Act's Appended Tables. As of mid-2026, the PSE mark requirement applies clearly to individual lithium-ion battery cells and certain battery packs when sold as consumer or industrial products. However, whether a complete stationary BESS system (e.g., a containerised grid-scale storage unit) falls within DENAN's designated product scope is UNCERTAIN — large integrated systems may instead be regulated primarily under the Electricity Business Act and Fire Service Act rather than DENAN. JIS C 8715-2 covers secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial stationary use. JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories) provides voluntary third-party certification that is commercially expected for many electrical products. Exporters MUST confirm current DENAN designated-product scope with METI or a qualified Japanese legal adviser before relying on this analysis.
summary.zh: 【存疑——使用本条前请向METI核实】日本《电气用品安全法》（DENAN）由经济产业省（METI）负责管理，要求对附表所列"指定电气用品及材料"加贴PSE标志。截至2026年中，PSE标志要求明确适用于作为消费品或工业产品销售的单独锂离子电芯及特定电池组。然而，完整的固定式储能系统（如集装箱式电网级储能单元）是否属于DENAN指定产品范围存疑——大型集成系统可能主要受《电气事业法》和《消防法》规制，而非DENAN。JIS C 8715-2适用于工业固定用二次锂电芯和电池。JET（日本电气安全及环境技术研究所）提供自愿性第三方认证，商业上被广泛期待。出口商在依据本分析前，务必就DENAN现行指定产品范围向METI或具资质的日本法律顾问进行确认。
summary.zht: 【存疑——使用本條前請向METI核實】日本《電氣用品安全法》（DENAN）由經濟產業省（METI）負責管理，要求對附表所列「指定電氣用品及材料」加貼PSE標誌。截至2026年中，PSE標誌要求明確適用於作為消費品或工業產品銷售的單獨鋰離子電芯及特定電池組。然而，完整的固定式儲能系統（如集裝箱式電網級儲能單元）是否屬於DENAN指定產品範圍存疑——大型整合系統可能主要受《電氣事業法》和《消防法》規制，而非DENAN。JIS C 8715-2適用於工業固定用二次鋰電芯和電池。JET（日本電氣安全及環境技術研究所）提供自願性第三方認證，商業上被廣泛期待。出口商在依據本分析前，務必就DENAN現行指定產品範圍向METI或具資質的日本法律顧問進行確認。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act, DENAN) — administered by METI
JIS C 8715-2 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications (stationary)
JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories) voluntary certification

summary.en: China requires lithium-based stationary storage batteries to comply with GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage) at the cell/module level and GB/T 36558-2022 for grid-connected ESS general technical requirements. Certification is conducted by CQC or other CNAS-accredited laboratories. GB test reports and certificates are not recognised as substitutes for PSE certification under DENAN, and JIS C 8715-2 is a separate Japanese standard not bridged to GB 36276.
summary.zh: 中国要求固定式锂电储能电池符合GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求，电芯/模组级）及GB/T 36558-2022（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件），由CQC或其他CNAS认可实验室进行认证。GB检测报告和证书不被认可为DENAN下PSE认证的替代依据，JIS C 8715-2是独立的日本标准，与GB 36276之间不存在互认机制。
summary.zht: 中國要求固定式鋰電儲能電池符合GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求，電芯/模組級）及GB/T 36558-2022（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件），由CQC或其他CNAS認可實驗室進行認證。GB檢測報告和證書不被認可為DENAN下PSE認證的替代依據，JIS C 8715-2是獨立的日本標準，與GB 36276之間不存在互認機制。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage)
GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)

gap.en: The primary gap is scope uncertainty: Chinese exporters must first determine whether their specific BESS product falls within DENAN's designated product list before identifying the correct compliance pathway. If individual battery cells or modules require PSE marking, they must be tested to JIS C 8715-2 or applicable JIS/IEC standards by a METI-registered third-party inspection body; GB 36276 certificates are not accepted as equivalent. If the complete system is outside DENAN scope, compliance shifts to the Electricity Business Act and Fire Service Act (see other rows). JET voluntary certification is commercially expected even where not legally mandatory. No bilateral recognition agreement exists between Japan and China for DENAN/PSE scope.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于适用范围不确定性：中国出口商必须首先确认其具体BESS产品是否属于DENAN指定产品目录，然后才能确定正确的合规路径。如果单独的电芯或模组需要PSE标志，则必须由METI注册的第三方检测机构按JIS C 8715-2或适用JIS/IEC标准进行测试；GB 36276证书不被接受为等效依据。如果完整系统不在DENAN范围内，合规要求转移至《电气事业法》和《消防法》（见其他条目）。JET自愿认证即便在法律上非强制，在商业上亦被广泛期待。日本与中国之间目前不存在DENAN/PSE范围的双边互认协议。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於適用範圍不確定性：中國出口商必須首先確認其具體BESS產品是否屬於DENAN指定產品目錄，然後才能確定正確的合規路徑。如果單獨的電芯或模組需要PSE標誌，則必須由METI註冊的第三方檢測機構按JIS C 8715-2或適用JIS/IEC標準進行測試；GB 36276證書不被接受為等效依據。如果完整系統不在DENAN範圍內，合規要求轉移至《電氣事業法》和《消防法》（見其他條目）。JET自願認證即便在法律上非強制，在商業上亦被廣泛期待。日本與中國之間目前不存在DENAN/PSE範圍的雙邊互認協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for designated products under DENAN; scope applicability to complete stationary BESS systems is UNCERTAIN — verify with METI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market (GB 36276-2023 mandatory safety standard per SAC); GB/T 36558-2022 is recommended/referenced standard

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNCERTAIN] Chinese BESS exporters must first confirm whether their product falls within DENAN's designated product scope. If battery cells or modules are in scope, PSE certification via a METI-registered body is required; GB 36276 certificates do not substitute. JET voluntary certification is commercially expected. For complete BESS systems, the applicable regulatory framework (DENAN vs. Electricity Business Act vs. Fire Service Act) must be confirmed with a qualified Japanese legal adviser before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考——存疑] 中国BESS出口商须首先确认其产品是否属于DENAN指定产品范围。如果电芯或模组在范围内，须通过METI注册机构取得PSE认证；GB 36276证书不能替代。JET自愿认证在商业上被广泛期待。对于完整BESS系统，适用的监管框架（DENAN vs. 电气事业法 vs. 消防法）须在出口前与具资质的日本法律顾问确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考——存疑] 中國BESS出口商須首先確認其產品是否屬於DENAN指定產品範圍。如果電芯或模組在範圍內，須通過METI註冊機構取得PSE認證；GB 36276證書不能替代。JET自願認證在商業上被廣泛期待。對於完整BESS系統，適用的監管框架（DENAN vs. 電氣事業法 vs. 消防法）須在出口前與具資質的日本法律顧問確認。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Cell / Module Safety Standard — JIS C 8715-2 (Industrial Stationary)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯/模组安全标准 — JIS C 8715-2（工业固定用）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯/模組安全標準 — JIS C 8715-2（工業固定用）

summary.en: JIS C 8715-2 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications — stationary) sets out safety test requirements for lithium secondary cells and batteries used in stationary industrial energy storage applications in Japan. It is the primary Japanese cell/module safety standard for BESS components. Compliance may be required under DENAN for battery components that appear on the designated-product list, and is expected by Japanese customers and certification bodies (including JET) for industrial stationary storage products.
summary.zh: JIS C 8715-2（工业应用二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——固定式）规定了日本固定式工业储能应用中锂二次电芯和电池的安全测试要求。该标准是BESS组件最主要的日本电芯/模组安全标准。对于出现在指定产品清单上的电池组件，可能须在DENAN框架下符合该标准，日本客户和认证机构（包括JET）对工业固定式储能产品亦期待符合该标准。
summary.zht: JIS C 8715-2（工業應用二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——固定式）規定了日本固定式工業儲能應用中鋰二次電芯和電池的安全測試要求。該標準是BESS組件最主要的日本電芯/模組安全標準。對於出現在指定產品清單上的電池組件，可能須在DENAN框架下符合該標準，日本客戶和認證機構（包括JET）對工業固定式儲能產品亦期待符合該標準。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 8715-2 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications (stationary)
電気用品安全法 (DENAN) — designated product list scope (verify with METI)

summary.en: GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage) is the primary Chinese cell/module safety standard for stationary storage batteries. GB 36276 and JIS C 8715-2 cover broadly similar safety objectives (overcharge, overdischarge, short circuit, thermal, mechanical) but are separate national standards with different test conditions, pass/fail criteria, and documentation requirements. GB 36276 test data is not accepted as equivalent to JIS C 8715-2 compliance by Japanese certification bodies.
summary.zh: GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求）是中国固定式储能电池最主要的电芯/模组安全标准。GB 36276与JIS C 8715-2在安全目标（过充、过放、短路、热、机械）上大体相似，但属于不同国家标准，测试条件、通过/不通过判据和文件要求均有差异。日本认证机构不接受GB 36276测试数据作为符合JIS C 8715-2的等效依据。
summary.zht: GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求）是中國固定式儲能電池最主要的電芯/模組安全標準。GB 36276與JIS C 8715-2在安全目標（過充、過放、短路、熱、機械）上大體相似，但屬於不同國家標準，測試條件、通過/不通過判據和文件要求均有差異。日本認證機構不接受GB 36276測試數據作為符合JIS C 8715-2的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage)

gap.en: Chinese BESS exporters holding GB 36276-2023 cell/module safety certificates must additionally test to JIS C 8715-2 (or IEC 62619 as a bridge standard, if accepted by the Japanese certification body) for Japan market acceptance. No delta-evaluation or mutual-recognition pathway between GB 36276 and JIS C 8715-2 is confirmed as of mid-2026. JET certification against JIS C 8715-2 is commercially expected even where not legally mandatory under DENAN.
gap.zh: 持有GB 36276-2023电芯/模组安全证书的中国BESS出口商，须额外按JIS C 8715-2进行测试（如日本认证机构接受，亦可采用IEC 62619作为桥接标准），以满足日本市场准入要求。截至2026年中，GB 36276与JIS C 8715-2之间尚无经确认的差异评估或互认路径。即便在DENAN框架下不具法律强制性，JET按JIS C 8715-2的认证在商业上亦被广泛期待。
gap.zht: 持有GB 36276-2023電芯/模組安全證書的中國BESS出口商，須額外按JIS C 8715-2進行測試（如日本認證機構接受，亦可採用IEC 62619作為橋接標準），以滿足日本市場准入要求。截至2026年中，GB 36276與JIS C 8715-2之間尚無經確認的差異評估或互認路徑。即便在DENAN框架下不具法律強制性，JET按JIS C 8715-2的認證在商業上亦被廣泛期待。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for designated products under DENAN; commercially expected by Japanese customers and JET certification bodies for industrial stationary storage
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 36276-2023

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS cells and modules certified to GB 36276-2023 must undergo separate testing to JIS C 8715-2 (or IEC 62619 if accepted) for Japan market access. GB 36276 certificates do not substitute for JIS C 8715-2 compliance. Obtain JET voluntary certification to strengthen market acceptance. Confirm DENAN designated-product scope with METI or a qualified adviser.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 已按GB 36276-2023取得认证的中国BESS电芯和模组，须额外按JIS C 8715-2（如被接受，亦可按IEC 62619）进行测试方可进入日本市场。GB 36276证书不能替代JIS C 8715-2合规证明。建议取得JET自愿认证以增强市场接受度。须向METI或具资质顾问确认DENAN指定产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 已按GB 36276-2023取得認證的中國BESS電芯和模組，須額外按JIS C 8715-2（如被接受，亦可按IEC 62619）進行測試方可進入日本市場。GB 36276證書不能替代JIS C 8715-2合規證明。建議取得JET自願認證以增強市場接受度。須向METI或具資質顧問確認DENAN指定產品範圍。
